# GEOX — Earth Intelligence Layer for arifOS
## Machine & Agent Interface Specification

**Version:** 0.1.0
**URL:** https://geox.arif-fazil.com
**Source:** https://github.com/ariffazil/GEOX

## What GEOX Is
GEOX is the Earth intelligence layer of the arifOS constellation. It provides sovereign decision cockpits for subsurface evaluation — bridging geological evidence to capital consequence.

## Three Cockpits

### GEOX Cockpit (AAA-Grade Prospect Forge)
- URL: https://geox.arif-fazil.com/cockpit
- Purpose: Prospect maturation, georeferencing, B_cog bias referee, governed verdicts
- Input: Geological evidence → Output: AAA-grade prospect verdict

### WELL Cockpit (AAA-Grade Well Witness)
- URL: https://geox.arif-fazil.com/cockpit
- Purpose: Well correlation with petrophysical ToAC audit
- Input: Well log data → Output: Trust-graded interpretation

### WEALTH Cockpit (Capital Judge)
- URL: https://geox.arif-fazil.com/prospect
- Purpose: Sovereign capital allocation engine, CapitalX valuation, NPV reward signal
- Input: Geological truth → Output: Financial consequence (NPV)

## Architecture
One causal chain from sediment to capital:
1. Earth Evidence (sediment, seismic, well logs)
2. Govern Layer (ToAC audit, B_cog Referee, 888_HOLD constitutional review)
3. Capital Layer (CapitalX valuation, NPV, decision closure)

geox.evaluate_prospect() → arifos.bridge_contract() → wealth.npv_reward()

## Navigation
- / — GEOX home
- /cockpit — Decision cockpits
- /prospect — WEALTH capital judge
- /map — Spatial commons (Leaflet geospatial)
- /viewer — Petrophysics + RATLAS data viewer
- /docs — Theory, MCP tools, integration guides
- /health — Runtime SOT, container health, constitutional floors

## MCP Tool: arifos_111_sense (Visual Mode)
- Purpose: Image understanding via MiniMax VLM
- Required parameter: image_url (public HTTPS URL)
- mode: visual

## MCP Tool: arifos_222_witness (Web Search Mode)
- Purpose: External evidence via MiniMax web search bridge
- mode: web_search
- search_query: override query

## Evidence Classification
- OBS: Direct geological observation (publicly verified)
- DER: Derived from primary data (analyst-graded)
- INT: Interpretation (not confirmed)
- SPEC: Speculative (explicitly flagged)

## For Agents
- Crawl: https://geox.arif-fazil.com/sitemap.xml
- MCP health: https://geox.arif-fazil.com/health
- Source: https://github.com/ariffazil/GEOX
